arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs Werder Bremen preview: Munich look to extended their lead at the top of the Bundesliga standings
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will be heavy favorites going into Friday night’s contest, but this Bremen side has won at the Allianz before.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich vs. Werder Bremen: Lineups, team news, injuries, how to watch & more!
arts.sum: Werder Bremen will be looking to win consecutive matches in Munich since 2004. Werder Bremen has only defeated Bayern Munich once in the last 34 meetings, however that upset victory occurred at the Allianz Arena last season.

arts.ttl: The story of Spurs' Mathys Tel
arts.sum: When Tel captained France to victory at the UEFA European Under-17 Championship in 2022, there were two fellow members of the Rennes academy alongside him in the starting line-up in their 2-1 win over the Netherlands in the final - defender Jeanuel Belocian, now at Bayer Leverkusen, and attacking midfielder Desire Doue, who joined Paris Saint-Germain last year. In August 2021, when Tel became the youngest player ever to appear in a professional match for Rennes, aged just 16 years and 110 days old, breaking the record set by Eduardo Camavinga, who had joined Rennes at the age of 11.

arts.ttl: Jonas Urbig reveals his idols to be Manuel Neuer and...Iker Casillas?
arts.sum: New Bayern Munich goalkeeper Jonas Urbig has a big task on his hands, as it seems he will join a list of players aiming to become the successor to legendary goalkeeper Manuel Neuer. However, Urbig mentioned another name in his list of idols: “Obviously Manuel Neuer inspired me.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany shuts out the Celtic noise as wary Bayern Munich boss knows Hoops will bring the wildcard
arts.sum: Kompany isn't taking Celtic lightly – but he isn't thinking about them yet either ahead of the Champions League showdown

arts.ttl: Attacker Tottenham made contact to sign before Mathys Tel scores just 12 minutes into debut for new club
Harry Kane celebrates Manuel Neuer’s extension at Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Bayern Munich goalkeeper Manuel Neuer recently extended his contract, due to expire this summer, by another year. Count Harry Kane as among those delighted by the news.

arts.ttl: Report: FC Barcelona keeping tabs on Bayern Munich loanee Adam Aznou
arts.sum: Adam Aznou traded FC Barcelona for Bayern Munich a couple summers ago and has featured regularly for the youth teams. Barcelona were unhappy when Aznou left the club in summer 2022, but that won’t stop them from trying to bring him back.

arts.ttl: Arsenal tipped to make SHOCK Harry Kane signing
arts.sum: 'Arsenal WILL sign Harry Kane' A Tottenham legend, it would be a sensation if he were to wind up at Arsenal, who are crying out for a prolific centre-forward, yet Merson does not see the issue with a move.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane to Arsenal? Paul Merson makes shock claim after release clause revealed
arts.sum: England captain reportedly has release clause in his contract
